commitResults.messageTitle: Add visual error feedback to commandbox
commitResults.messageBody: Turn user input red on invalid input, resetting on new input

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix logic error in saving expense list
commitResults.messageBody:
The program was saving the filtered expense list instead of the
original expense list, resulting in cases where certain expenses
could be deleted if it were filtered out before exiting the program.

Update logic to save the original expense list instead of the filtered
expense list.

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix printing errors to terminal instead of ui
Fix balance panel not updating during filter
commitResults.messageBody: Also fixed self-debt issue in final balances

commitResults.messageTitle: Add placeholder icons for main and help windows
Fix duplicate participants in expense card
commitResults.messageBody:
Previously, duplicate flags (e.g., s/john s/john) caused the
participant's name to be listed multiple times in the expense card
even though balance calculation assumes they are the same person.

Added a check in tokenizer to filter out duplicates.

With this change, duplicates tags will also not be possible.
